name: Chocolate Covered Brownie Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare and bake the brownie mix according to package directions.
3. While the brownies are still warm, cut them into pieces and roll each piece into a ball. Allow to cool completely.
4. In a heavy saucepan or double boiler over low heat, melt the baking chocolate with the condensed milk. Add the vanilla and butter. Mix well until smooth.
5. Dip each cooled brownie ball into the melted chocolate mixture, ensuring it is well coated. If the chocolate becomes too thick to coat easily, reheat it slightly to thin it out.
6. Place the dipped brownie balls on a rack for excess chocolate to drip off.
7. Once set, decorate the tops of the brownie bites with chopped nuts, sprinkles, or white chocolate if desired.
